refnamediv.refpurpose: graphical interface to log out from LXSession

refsect1.title: DESCRIPTION
refsect1.para: lxsession-logout provides a graphical shutdown, reboot, lock, and logout selection screen for the desktop session. It interacts directly with the active session server over D-Bus to safely interrupt execution loops and clear background processes.

refsect1.title: OPTIONS
refsect1.para: This program follows the standard GNU command-line syntax, with long options starting with two dashes (`--`). A summary of available configuration parameters is included below.

listitem.para: Customize the descriptive string text or header prompt displayed in the logout dialog user interface.
Specify an external graphical branding image or logo file to customize the dialog window aesthetic layout.
Define the alignment position of the banner image relative to the control actions menu buttons selection panel.

refsect1.title: AUTHOR
refsect1.para: This manual page was originally written by paulliu grandpaul@gmail.com for the Debian system (but may be used by others). Permission is granted to copy, distribute and/or modify this document under the terms of the GNU General Public License, Version 2 or any later version published by the Free Software Foundation.
On Debian systems, the complete text of the GNU General Public License can be found in /usr/share/common-licenses/GPL.
